message:
fix(ci): Windows EXE_SUFFIX in e2e tests + modern llvm-cov report flag

After the prior cleanup brought 7 of 9 jobs green, two real bugs
remained:

1. **Test (windows-latest) — 36 failures in fastmcp-console e2e tests.**
   crates/fastmcp-console/tests/e2e/helpers.rs hard-coded the example
   binary path as `target/debug/examples/test_server`, but Cargo
   builds Windows binaries with a `.exe` suffix
   (`test_server.exe`).  Every e2e test panicked at the existence
   assertion:

       test_server binary not found at
       D:\a\fastmcp_rust\fastmcp_rust\crates\fastmcp-console\../../target\debug/examples/test_server

   Append `std::env::consts::EXE_SUFFIX` to the binary name so the
   path is `test_server` on Linux/macOS and `test_server.exe` on
   Windows — same code, no runner-os branching.

2. **Coverage (llvm-cov) — second invocation rejected by newer
   cargo-llvm-cov.**  The "Generate coverage summary JSON" step ran
   `cargo llvm-cov ... --no-run --no-clean` to reuse the profraw
   data from the first step, but cargo-llvm-cov now rejects that
   combination:

       warning: --no-run is deprecated, use `cargo llvm-cov report` subcommand instead
       error: --no-run may not be used together with --no-clean

   Switch to the dedicated `cargo llvm-cov report --json --summary-only`
   subcommand, which reads the existing profraw artifacts and is the
   officially-blessed replacement for `--no-run --no-clean`.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -132,10 +132,13 @@ jobs:
             --fail-under-lines 80
 
       - name: Generate coverage summary JSON
+        # `cargo llvm-cov report` reuses the profraw data already on disk
+        # from the previous step, so we don't re-run the test suite.  The
+        # old `--no-run --no-clean` combo is no longer accepted (cargo-llvm-cov
+        # rejects both flags together as of recent releases).
         run: |
-          cargo llvm-cov --all-features --workspace \
-            --json --summary-only --output-path coverage-summary.json \
-            --no-run --no-clean
+          cargo llvm-cov report --json --summary-only \
+            --output-path coverage-summary.json
 
       - name: Upload coverage artifact
         uses: actions/upload-artifact@v7
